title: Task updates should be latest to earliest
excerpt:
In the updates of each task, each new message is added at the end of the list, but users want to see the latest update without scrolling. 
Please add the option to sort updates from newest to oldest.

posts.author: EL14 (Esther Levine)
posts.cookedHtml:
In the updates of each task, each new message is added at the end of the list, but users want to see the latest update without scrolling.
Please add the option to sort updates from newest to oldest.
